neverallow {
    untrusted_app
    untrusted_app_25
    untrusted_app_27
    untrusted_app_all
    isolated_app
} vendor_perfengine_service:service_manager find;

neverallow {
    untrusted_app
    untrusted_app_25
    untrusted_app_27
    untrusted_app_all
    isolated_app
} vendor_perfengine_service:binder { call transfer };
